---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or feature for Career OS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Overview
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you would like to see in Career OS.

## 🧩 Problem Being Solved
Is your feature request related to a problem or workflow limitation? Describe the pain point cleanly.

## 🚀 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen or how you envision this working.

## 🎨 Alternatives Considered
A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📌 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.
